question: Which five products generated the highest revenue?
sql: SELECT p.name, ROUND(SUM(oi.line_total), 2) AS revenue FROM products AS p JOIN order_items AS oi ON oi.product_id = p.id JOIN orders AS o ON o.id = oi.order_id WHERE o.status IN ('completed', 'shipped') GROUP BY p.id, p.name ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 5;

question: Show revenue by shipping city.
sql: SELECT o.shipping_city, ROUND(SUM(oi.line_total), 2) AS revenue FROM orders AS o JOIN order_items AS oi ON oi.order_id = o.id WHERE o.status IN ('completed', 'shipped') GROUP BY o.shipping_city ORDER BY revenue DESC;

question: What is the average order value by customer city?
sql: SELECT c.city, ROUND(AVG(o.total_amount), 2) AS average_order_value FROM customers AS c JOIN orders AS o ON o.customer_id = c.id WHERE o.status IN ('completed', 'shipped') GROUP BY c.city ORDER BY average_order_value DESC;

question: How many completed orders were placed in June 2026?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS completed_order_count FROM orders WHERE status = 'completed' AND order_date >= DATE '2026-06-01' AND order_date < DATE '2026-07-01';

question: How many active products are in each category?
sql: SELECT c.name AS category_name, COUNT(p.id) AS active_product_count FROM categories AS c LEFT JOIN products AS p ON p.category_id = c.id AND p.active = TRUE GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY active_product_count DESC;

question: Show customers who placed more than three orders.
sql: SELECT c.id, c.full_name, COUNT(o.id) AS order_count FROM customers AS c JOIN orders AS o ON o.customer_id = c.id GROUP BY c.id, c.full_name HAVING COUNT(o.id) > 3 ORDER BY order_count DESC;
